title: Sites
subtitle: Manage your HTTP servers and routes.
noServersHint: Add a server to start serving traffic.

deleteServer.title: Delete Server
deleteServer.description: Are you sure you want to delete server "{{serverId}}"? This will remove all its routes and configuration. This action cannot be undone.

detail.routesDescription: Routes are evaluated in order. First match wins (if terminal).

deleteRoute.title: Delete Route
deleteRoute.description: Are you sure you want to delete route #{{index}}? This action cannot be undone.

serverForm.idDescription: A unique identifier for this server.
serverForm.listenDescription: Addresses to listen on (one per line).
serverForm.httpsDescription: When checked, Caddy will not automatically manage TLS certificates for this server.
